title: ononis natrix var. mauritanica
intro: Ononis natrix var. mauritanica, also known as the spiny restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family, characterized by its prickly stems and yellow flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and urinary tract infections. The medicinal properties of Ononis natrix var. mauritanica are said to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
